name: State of Dance Website
description: A dance class management system that allows users to view and register for dance classes, as well as manage their accounts and payments. The system also allows administrators to manage classes, instructors, and students.

name: Gym Management System
description: A gym management system that tracks and manages attendances, subscriptions, and training schedules. The system also allows administrators to manage gym members, trainers, and classes.

name: Physics Simulation
description: A physics simulation that allows users to visualize and interact with various physics concepts, such as gravity, friction, and collisions.

name: ClubDawg
description: ClubDawg is a social application with gamification elements such as a Space Invaders-esque game, a Flappy Bird-like, and a RNG-based customization system. It utilizes Firebase to incorporate real-time chatting, personalized rooms, leaderboards, and file sharing.

name: Lost and Found
description: A simple lost and found system that allows users to report lost and found items, as well as view and claim items. The system also allows administrators to manage reported items and users.
